[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: Fab Fours FS23-X5952-1 Ford F250/F350 Superduty 2023-2025 Matrix Front – BumperOnly
[METADATA/INTRO]: Product Details Fab Fours Matrix Front Winch Bumper FS23-X5952-1...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: - Accommodates Adaptive Cruise Control. 
 - Standard Design Available in Full Guard / Pre-runner Guard / No Guard options (Meets Factory Wheel Well) 
 - Open Fender Design Available in Full Guard / Pre-runner Guard / No Guard options (Shorter Wheel Well Extension) 
 - Slim “High and Tight” Design 
 - Removable light inserts for optimal customization 
 - Provides far more tire clearance. 
 - Integrated D-Ring Mounts 
 Why is this winch bumper the right choice for your Ford F250/F350 Superduty? 
 If you’re searching for one of the best looking bumper for your truck, look no further. The aggressive design of this Fab Fours Bumper has no rivals. Its plate steel construction is there for more than just looks. This Matrix Front bumper is stout, with a total weight of 175 lbs., ready to accommodate a Winch of up to 12,000 lb. A fantastic bumper option to help you get everything done. As always, the classic Fab Fours quality that’s made them famous is still there. This Matrix bumper gives you more tire clearance to improve your truck's cornering. While also increasing your truck’s airflow with the lower cutout. To finish, the Fab Fours 2-Stage Black Powder Coat does a great job at preventing corrosion and other damage to its paint.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: May 13, 2025
[TITLE]: Top Exterior Mods to Take Your Ford F-350 To A New Level | Custom Offsets
[METADATA/INTRO]: Top Exterior Mods to Take Your Ford F-350 To A New Level May 13, 2025...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: The Ford F-350 is a serious workhorse. Built for high-capacity towing, rugged off-road use, and long-haul durability, it’s also one of the most upgradable platforms out there. Whether you're pulling a fifth-wheel camper or flexing at a truck show, the right exterior mods can make your rig do both—tow harder and look tougher. 
 Here’s a breakdown of the best exterior upgrades for the Ford F-350, from body kits to bed accessories, all chosen to add real-world function and curb-stopping style. 
 1. Wide Fender Flares & Body Kits for Oversized Wheel Fitment 
 If you're running larger tires and aggressive offsets, fender flares and body kits are a must.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: Octane Front Bumper for 17-22 Superduty F250/F350 – Baseline Overland
[METADATA/INTRO]: 2017-2022 FORD SUPERDUTY F250/F350 OCTANE SERIES FRONT BUMPER All Bumpers are made to order. Most Front & Rear Bumpers are made in 9-12 weeks. However, lead times are an estimate and are subject to change....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: 2017-2022 FORD SUPERDUTY F250/F350 OCTANE SERIES FRONT BUMPER 
 All Bumpers are made to order. Most Front & Rear Bumpers are made in 9-12 weeks. However, lead times are an estimate and are subject to change. 
 The Chassis Unlimited “Octane Series” Light bar-style front bumper ships to your door ready to install on your truck, complete with our 3-Stage texture black powder coat. 
 Our Non-Winch Bumper features room for a 30" curved or straight dual row light bar, HD 1” thick recovery points, and mounts up to 4 LED Cube lights in the outer wings of the bumper. 
 The Octane series bumpers bring an entire new style to the bumper market and offer an industry-first low-profile fitment with aggressive styling. The Octane series is designed as a 3 Piece modular bumper, the outer bumper wings bolt to the center core section of the bumper. This modular design allows us to offer an extreme tight contour of the vehicle, as well as a product design & extreme strength that will last a lifetime. All of Chassis Unlimited’s products are designed & manufactured in Livermore California
